text.title: Audience to Paid Conversion Loop Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Audience to Paid Conversion Loop.

example.scenario: Newsletter A/B test on welcome email subject line, 7-day attribution.
example.trace: cohort defined (active subs, n=312) → window=7d frozen → variant 'subject-line-emoji' → wait 7d → conversion 4.8% vs 3.1% control → keep
